description: MODO (Play Digital S.A.) is an Argentine digital payments and banking-connectivity platform used in bank apps and its own wallet app for QR/NFC payments, transfers, and related financial services. It also offers open-banking and merchant-facing services such as payment initiation, cardholder validation, and identity validation.
summary: MODO exposes three documented HTTP integration surfaces under MODO Conexiones on `api.modo.com.ar`: the Cliente/Open Banking API, a cardholder validation API (VATA), and an identity/payment-authorization API (VITA); no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: MODO Conexiones API (Validación de Titularidad de Tarjetas / VATA)
MODO Conexiones API (Validación de Identidad y Autorización de Pagos / VITA)
